revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:朝倉神社]]
'''Asakura Shrine''' (朝倉神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}. * {{ill|Asakura Shrine (Nantan)|ja|朝倉神社 (南丹市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asakura Shrine (Nantan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Nantan, Kyoto|en|Nantan, Kyoto|qid=Q170421|lt=Nantan|1=Nantan, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Asakura Shrine (Kōchi)|ja|朝倉神社 (高知市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asakura Shrine (Kōchi)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kōchi, Kōchi|en|Kōchi, Kōchi|qid=Q200251|lt=Kōchi|1=Kōchi, Kōchi}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|qid=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}. {{disambiguation}} {{translated page|ja|朝倉神社|version=39202970|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:朝倉神社]]
<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Asakura Shrine--><!--Asakura Shrine-->
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{wikidata link|Q11517327}} [[Category:Shinto shrines with the same name]]
